This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] commandfor with command=show-modal light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor with command=request-close light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor with custom command light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor on submit button with form owner light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor on reset button with form owner light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor on auto-type button with form owner light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor on disabled button light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
[FAIL] commandfor pointing to non-popover element light dismisses the popover
  assert_false: popover should light dismiss expected false got true
Harness: the test ran to completion.
